summary: Verified header logo changes on Navbar: correct horizontal assets are used (VFX: nnvwlmc0_ripplelogohovfx.png.png, Digital: n3gbxvzr_ripplelogohodigital.png.png). All hover effects removed - img class is exactly 'h-[70px] w-auto' with no transition/scale/brightness/group-hover. No blur glow div inside logo anchor. Bounding box, computed transform ('none') and filter ('none') are identical before and after hover, so logo is visually static. Height = 70px preserved. Logo still clickable and triggers hero scroll. Department switch updates logo correctly. Side-menu logo unchanged (still uses kzqbmomq vertical Digital logo).
passed: img class exactly 'h-[70px] w-auto' (no hover/transition classes)
Bounding box unchanged on hover (175.22 x 70 before and after)
Computed transform stays 'none' and filter stays 'none' on hover
Logo click keeps URL on root (scrolls to #hero, no navigation)
Department switcher toggles logo between VFX and Digital horizontal versions
Side-menu logo still uses original vertical Digital asset (kzqbmomq_ripplelogodigital.png)
